key_insight: OmniMatBench is a novel benchmark that enhances multimodal reasoning in materials science by addressing gaps in knowledge to application reasoning.
engineering_relevance: This benchmark assists in refining AI models to better support materials scientists in both fundamental and applied research.
method: Developed a human-calibrated multimodal reasoning framework.
Curated 3,171 expert questions spanning 19 materials science subfields.
evidence_signal: The best-performing model achieved only a 0.372 overall score, highlighting significant reasoning gaps.
watch_item: The variation in model performance across different subfields may limit the generalizability of the findings.
paper_title: OmniMatBench: A Human-Calibrated Multimodal Reasoning Benchmark Across 19 Materials Science Subfields
